channel.title: 🔎 Jobs - Frontity Community Forum
channel.description: Topics in the '🔎 Jobs' category Are you open to Frontity freelance projects? Do you need a freelancer to work on a custom Frontity project? This is the place to post about it.

item.title: Best video editing apps
item.dc:creator: timjohnson2584
item.description:
There are several excellent video editing apps available for various platforms, each with its own set of features and capabilities. The “best” app can depend on your specific needs, level of expertise, and the platform you’re using (iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, etc.). Here are some of the top video editing apps across different platforms:

iOS:

  1. iMovie: A user-friendly and powerful video editing app for iOS devices. It offers a range of features suitable for beginners and more advanced users.
  2. LumaFusion: A professional-grade video editing app for iOS with advanced features like multi-track editing, color correction, and more.
  3. InShot: An easy-to-use app with features like trimming, transitions, filters, and effects. It’s great for quick edits and social media content.

Android:

  1. KineMaster: A popular and versatile video editing app for Android devices. It offers multiple layers of video and audio, transitions, effects, and more.
  2. FilmoraGo: An intuitive app with features like trimming, transitions, text, and filters. It’s suitable for both beginners and casual editors.
  3. PowerDirector: A comprehensive video editing app with features like multi-track editing, transitions, effects, and more advanced tools.

Windows:

  1. Adobe Premiere Pro: A professional-grade video editing software with a wide range of features for both beginners and experienced editors.
  2. DaVinci Resolve: A powerful video editing and color correction software available in both free and paid versions.
  3. Filmora: A user-friendly video editing software with a variety of effects, transitions, and features suitable for beginners.

macOS:

  1. Final Cut Pro: Apple’s professional video editing software with advanced features and integration with other Apple products.
  2. iMovie: Also available on macOS, offering an intuitive interface and a range of features for various levels of users.
  3. DaVinci Resolve: Available for macOS as well, offering professional video editing and color correction features.
    CapCut: Your Comprehensive Video Editing Companion
    Video editing has become an essential tool for content creators, social media influencers, and even those looking to capture and share memorable moments. In this landscape, capcut pro apk download emerges as a powerful video editing app that caters to a wide range of users, from beginners to more experienced editors.

5 posts - 5 participants

Read full topic

item.title: Job helping fixing Frontity website
item.dc:creator: santiler.cc
item.description:
I have a website that was deployed using Vercel. Unfortunately, after updating npm or node, the website is no longer running. I have lost the details of the latest deployment so I need someone to help me figuring out what combination of node and npm worked for the latest working version.

item.title: WPML / Multilingual + Frontity
item.dc:creator: ankush
item.description:
We are looking for a Frontity Developer who has experience integrating WPML. We would like to do this without creating another wordpress installation. Please reach out if you have experience with WPML or another wordpress translation plugin with Frontity Only.

The content is all in ACF Custom Fields

Note - This is an urgent requirement, so please only reach out if you have time.

item.description:

we want to know after development can we make an android and ios app using frontity?

if so if its easy to learn as i am self wp developer can we build it our own or if its complex to move existing website then how much a freelancer cost us? so we can think of budget and send the proposal to my senior if they approve

item.title: Need Experienced Developer to Help Finish and Deploy Project
item.dc:creator: kcristin
item.description:
Hello Frontity Community!

I started a project quite a few months back with a non-profit to help them overhaul their website using Wordpress + Frontity. Recently, I’ve hit a lull in my progress with the site as I’m doing it pro bono as a side project to help build my confidence with React, but work for my job has been ramping up.

I’ve been able to work on the website about one or two days out of the week and every time I go back to it, something that wasn’t previously broken seems to be that way (I’m not sure if this is due to plugin updates or if there’s a significant lag between code changes and what is shown in production). This is troubling because the last piece of the project that I needed to get through is getting rid of this pesky CORS error - which I can’t begin to debug until I fix whatever else is wrong with the site.

Right now, we’re looking for someone who is confident and competent in debugging code and deploying sites to Vercel through Github. Most of the creative work is done and has been built out, so this job would essentially be to fix what’s broken and to deploy the site to production. They’re willing to discuss price, but know that the expected turn-around for the project is 1-2 weeks (so the need here is for someone who is confident that they can accomplish these tasks quickly). I will be available to give you any of the information that I have throughout your work on the project to help accomplish this.

Please let me know if you or someone you know is interested and we can set up a meeting!

Cheers,
kcristin

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: Need Experienced Developer to Help Finish and Deploy Project

item.title: Need Frontity CoCart package developed
item.dc:creator: CoCart
item.description:
I’ve been wanting to do this myself but as the sole creator of CoCart, most of my time is currently developing the API, documentation, guides and customer support.

I have a JS Wrapper available which can be used to reduce development time.

What I am looking for is to create a package that can be used to support CoCart and be adaptable for various product types and extensions.

I’m near completing another big update for CoCart so developers have a greater head start in setting up their WordPress environment and have the basics to display products and add them to the cart out of the box so I need someone who can develop the Frontity package.

I don’t know how long it will take or how much so I’m looking for someone with experience and can communicate well. I do have a budge in mind but we can discuss that in private.

Just so you know CoCart is freemium plugin so there is a free version and pro version. Right now I just want to focus on the free features.

You can find all the developer resources here: https://cocart.dev/

As a side note, Frontity would also like this to be compatible so other e-commerce CMS can be integrated. This would allow the user to choose which without installing a specific package. Conversation notes can be found in WooCommerce Proof of Concept thread.

If you have any questions about this job please post them here.

If you are interested in the job or have questions about CoCart then contact me via DM.

I look forward to your responses.

regards,

Sébastien Dumont.

17 posts - 2 participants

Read full topic

item.title: Headless WordPress with React (Job offer)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Just found this job offer posted in Upwork - in case any member of the community is interested:

Upwork

Headless WordPress with React

Create a headless WordPress with CSS, and Frontity (React) and make menu and content editable with Gutenberg like this: https://frontity.org/blog/connecting-gutenberg-and-frontity/ https://frontity.org/blog/fetching-menus-from-wordpress/

item.title: Looking for an ecommerce EXPERT for help on an exsisting project
item.dc:creator: meaghan1
item.description:
Hi community members!

My development team is looking for an eCommerce EXPERT to help out with a short-term (1-2 week) project. We are looking for someone who has specific expertise in payment processing using a combination of React/Authorize.net/Woo-commerce.

  • Pay will be determined on experience level.
  • Available to get started ASAP (today or tomorrow)

If interested, please email me at meaghan@baalspots.com, and please attach a copy of your resume.

4 posts - 4 participants

Read full topic
item.source: Looking for an ecommerce EXPERT for help on an exsisting project

item.title: WordPress Website Development using React & Frontity
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
In case any member of the community is interested:

The startup SupportLogic, whose website is built with Frontity (https://www.supportlogic.io/) is looking for an experienced React Developer to enhance the functionality of their existing theme, update the design and add several new features.

You can find more details about the project and job here:

Upwork

Wordpress Website Development using ReactJS & Frontity

We are a startup in Silicon Valley, our company website (https://www.supportlogic.io) is built on ReactJS and Frontity with wordpress as the CMS platform (headless CMS). We are using wpengine for Wordpress and the front-end is served through a GCP VM...

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
item.source: WordPress Website Development using React & Frontity

item.title: About the 🔎 Jobs category
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Are you open to Frontity freelance projects? Do you need a freelancer to work on a custom Frontity project? This is the place to post about it.

When open a new topic, please use one of the following subcategories:

  • Jobs Listings: this subcategory is for jobs offerings. These posts typically include a description of the position or job that is needed, requirements and contact information with how to follow up.

  • Available for Hire: this subcategory is for freelancers. Let people know more about your skills, previous projects and what type of services you are offering.

1 post - 1 participant

Read full topic
